functionDeclarations.name: observe
functionDeclarations.description: Read the current accessible surface as @id elements with role, label, value, and flags. Re-run after changes.

functionDeclarations.name: act
functionDeclarations.description: Act on a current @id with structural gates and an effect receipt; returns fresh elements.

id.description: The @id of the target element from observe().

verb.description: click for one ordinary click (selection/simple control); activate for a default enter/open action; fill a text field; select an option; submit a form; toggle a checkbox.

value.description: The text to fill, or the option to select. Omit for click/submit/toggle.

confirm.description: True only after the user explicitly approved this exact consequential action.

functionDeclarations.name: do_steps
functionDeclarations.description: Run short ordered current-@id actions on one stable surface; stop on first failure and return fresh state.

steps.description: The ordered steps, each shaped like an act() call.

functionDeclarations.name: click_at
functionDeclarations.description: Click the CENTER of a numbered grid cell. Only for UIA-blind canvas/image space; native elements in the cell are blocked. Never use to choose among collection items.

cell.description: The grid number printed over the target.

functionDeclarations.name: zoom
functionDeclarations.description: Magnify the numbered GRID CELL so small targets become large and a fresh finer grid is drawn over it. Pass the cell's printed number.

functionDeclarations.name: reset_view
functionDeclarations.description: Return the view to the ACTIVE window (the default; undoes zoom and see_whole_screen).

functionDeclarations.name: see_whole_screen
functionDeclarations.description: Show the full display for cross-surface awareness. Return to the active surface before precise input.

functionDeclarations.name: look
functionDeclarations.description: Get a precise high-resolution reading of visible content that structured providers cannot expose. Ask one specific spatial or visual question; the result comes from a clean capture of the current view.

question.description: A precise question about the visible content and its spatial state.

functionDeclarations.name: click_target
functionDeclarations.description: Vision-click only when no usable structured element exists; a fresh marked crop verifies the point. Prefer act. button=right opens a context menu.

button.description: left (default) or right for a context menu.

functionDeclarations.name: map_targets
functionDeclarations.description: Map numbered vision anchors for one structured-blind region; mutations invalidate them and click_mark re-verifies before input.

description.description: The visible target set to map.

functionDeclarations.name: click_mark
functionDeclarations.description: Click a numbered anchor shown on the current grounded frame. Stale marks fail closed. Set button='right' for a context menu.

functionDeclarations.name: wait
functionDeclarations.description: Pause for N seconds only when an asynchronous operation is known to be pending. Then re-observe.

functionDeclarations.name: type_text
functionDeclarations.description: Type literal text into the exact current surface. target must be its observation identity; stale or ambiguous targets fail. press_enter is separate.

target.description: Current surface target from context or list_windows.

functionDeclarations.name: scroll
functionDeclarations.description: Scroll in a direction, optionally at a current grid cell; otherwise use view center.

functionDeclarations.name: drag
functionDeclarations.description: Press at one current grid cell, move to another, and release. Zoom first when either endpoint needs finer localization.

functionDeclarations.name: drag_target
functionDeclarations.description: Drag between described endpoints selected from one frame, then rebound and verified by one fresh detector pass.

from.description: The visible object or handle to grab.

to.description: The visible destination or final handle position.

functionDeclarations.name: click_here
functionDeclarations.description: Activate at the current pointer without moving it. Use only for an explicitly pointer-relative target.

functionDeclarations.name: point_at
functionDeclarations.description: Move the pointer onto a described target without activating it. dwell_seconds optionally holds hover state.

functionDeclarations.name: key_combination
functionDeclarations.description: Press a key/chord in the exact current surface. target must be its observation identity; hold_seconds is only for timed input.

target.description: Current surface target from context or list_windows.

functionDeclarations.name: open_url
functionDeclarations.description: Open an http(s) URL in a persistent user-visible tab; otherwise use the OS shell. Use research_web for disposable browsing.

functionDeclarations.name: launch_app
functionDeclarations.description: Launch or focus an app, or open a file through the platform shell. Put its executable, package, label, or path in name; args stay separate.

args.description: Optional command-line arguments / file to open.

functionDeclarations.name: system_query
functionDeclarations.description: Read trusted OS facts without mutation; capabilities.list describes domains.

query.description: The query inside the domain, e.g. 'active_sessions', 'list_basic', 'volumes', 'list', or 'text'.

functionDeclarations.name: list_files
functionDeclarations.description: List one directory's names/metadata, exact scope, and exclusions. Collection-wide content work must read each in-scope file.

path.description: Absolute path or standard folder name.

functionDeclarations.name: read_text_file
functionDeclarations.description: Read bounded UTF-8 text at an absolute path with hash and truncation metadata.

functionDeclarations.name: edit_text_file
functionDeclarations.description: Exact-replace bounded UTF-8 text by current hash/count with an atomic verified result. Use for normal content/data edits; CSV/TSV record shape and formula bytes are immutable and auto-preserved.

expected_sha256.description: Exact sha256 from a current read_text_file call.

functionDeclarations.name: edit_text_file_structure
functionDeclarations.description: Exact CSV/TSV row, column, or formula edit. First call only preflights and returns a proposal token; an identical retry commits only if an independent check finds that the user requested that structural effect. Never use for ordinary data.

expected_sha256.description: Exact sha256 from a current read_text_file call.

structural_change_token.description: Preflight proposal token; identifies bytes, not permission.

functionDeclarations.name: run_command
functionDeclarations.description: Run a non-interactive command. Prefer program with literal args/cwd; inline interpreters are rejected. Results prove only that invocation. command is a platform-shell fallback with withheld output. Supply exactly one.

cwd.description: Existing absolute working directory; omit for managed scratch.

command.description: Platform-shell fallback; mutually exclusive with program.

functionDeclarations.name: focus_window
functionDeclarations.description: Focus one exact current surface. Use a list_windows target; exact package/title must have one current match. Success requires a fresh focused-surface postcondition.

title.description: Current list_windows target, or unique exact package/title.

functionDeclarations.name: list_windows
functionDeclarations.description: List current interactive surfaces, including semantic-blind ones, with app, display, and observation identity. Re-list after changes.

functionDeclarations.name: minimize_window
functionDeclarations.description: Minimize the exact current surface and verify it left foreground; unsupported layouts return unsupported_on_surface.

title.description: Current list_windows target, or unique exact package/title.

functionDeclarations.name: resize_window
functionDeclarations.description: Resize an exact window where platform geometry exists; otherwise return unsupported_on_surface.

functionDeclarations.name: move_window
functionDeclarations.description: Move an exact window to screen pixel (x, y) where platform geometry exists; otherwise return unsupported_on_surface.

functionDeclarations.name: read_clipboard
functionDeclarations.description: Read current system clipboard text without mutation.

functionDeclarations.name: artifact_info
functionDeclarations.description: Inspect local artifact metadata, counts, hash, path, and bounded preview without returning full content.

id.description: Artifact id, or an absolute artifact file path.

functionDeclarations.name: extract_artifact
functionDeclarations.description: Create an exact subrange artifact before pasting/saving a subset. Anchors are literal; ambiguity fails.

functionDeclarations.name: save_artifact
functionDeclarations.description: Save or copy a local text artifact without routing its full content through the model.

overwrite.description: Default false; true to overwrite an existing file.

functionDeclarations.name: paste_artifact
functionDeclarations.description: Paste a local text artifact into the focused destination without routing its full contents through the model. Use for large or exact transfers.

id.description: Artifact id returned by browser_extract_page/browser_read_page, or an artifact file path.

functionDeclarations.name: done
functionDeclarations.description: After verified state-changing work, speak one brief final result and immediately call done with the same summary. Emit nothing after its response. Read-only turns answer without done.

functionDeclarations.name: search_memory
functionDeclarations.description: Search saved prior-conversation records when the current request depends on earlier context. Returns matching ids and bounded snippets.

functionDeclarations.name: open_memory
functionDeclarations.description: Read the FULL transcript of one past conversation returned by search_memory. Pass its id.

id.description: The conversation id from a search_memory result.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_setup
functionDeclarations.description: Repair disconnected or staged browser control. Follow its bounded setup once, then check browser_status.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_status
functionDeclarations.description: Check browser-bridge connection, negotiated capabilities, compatibility, staged-update state, and pairing state.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_reset
functionDeclarations.description: Reset browser-control pairing state and reopen its pairing window. Use only when the connection state requires repair.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_read_page
functionDeclarations.description: Read the controlled page's title, URL, and whole visible DOM text. Its artifact represents the whole capture; derive a subset with extract_artifact before paste/save when the user requests only part of the page.

functionDeclarations.name: research_web
functionDeclarations.description: Read unique sources. Coverage proves identity, not facts. Restrict owner hosts with domain_restricted; narrow missing facts or pass known source_urls.

purpose.description: Public subjects, fields, units, and qualifiers.

source_policy.description: Diversify, preserve order, or restrict hosts.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_extract_page
functionDeclarations.description: Extract full visible DOM text into a local artifact and return only metadata, counts, and preview.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_wait_for
functionDeclarations.description: Wait until an element matching a CSS selector appears (or timeout). Use after a click/navigation that loads content.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_eval
functionDeclarations.description: Run nonblocking JavaScript in the page and return a JSON-compatible result. Modal dialogs and blocking or unbounded loops are forbidden.

code.description: A JS expression; its value is returned. An IIFE containing statements must explicitly return a JSON-compatible value. Must NOT block (no alert/confirm/prompt, no while(true)).

functionDeclarations.name: browser_navigate
functionDeclarations.description: Navigate a URL. turn isolates work in an auto-closing tab; persistent replaces and leaves the exact controlled/current tab.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_history
functionDeclarations.description: Verified back/forward navigation in the exact controlled tab.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_open_tab
functionDeclarations.description: Open and bind a tab. Defaults to persistent; turn auto-closes it.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_upload
functionDeclarations.description: Set the file for a file <input> matching a CSS selector (real upload via DevTools). Pass an absolute file path.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_tabs
functionDeclarations.description: List the open browser tabs (id, title, url, active).

functionDeclarations.name: browser_switch_tab
functionDeclarations.description: Select a browser tab by id (from browser_tabs). Page tools keep targeting that exact tab for the rest of the current user turn even if focus moves.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_close_tab
functionDeclarations.description: Close exactly one browser tab by its id (from browser_tabs).

functionDeclarations.name: browser_network
functionDeclarations.description: Read bounded recent network events from the controlled page, enabling capture first if needed.

filter.description: Optional substring of the CDP event name, e.g. 'responseReceived'.

functionDeclarations.name: browser_console
functionDeclarations.description: Read bounded page console and browser-log events, enabling capture first if needed.

functionDeclarations.name: list_app_integrations
functionDeclarations.description: List precise-control providers and readiness; use only when relevant.

functionDeclarations.name: setup_app_integration
functionDeclarations.description: Install/activate a provider. Third-party execution requires confirmed:true after explicit user approval.

confirmed.description: Pass true ONLY after the user agreed to install it.

functionDeclarations.name: app_integration_status
functionDeclarations.description: Read provider connection, app probe, and tool activation.

functionDeclarations.name: read_app_integration_docs
functionDeclarations.description: Read catalog-linked provider setup docs; arbitrary URLs are rejected.

functionDeclarations.name: remove_app_integration
functionDeclarations.description: Uninstall and disconnect a provider by id.
